body: This further develops the basis of ShallowWaterModels and generalizes some features of Oceananigans to allow for more models than just IncompressibleModels.
title: Time stepping tests for ShallowWaterModel

body: Been a lot of changes since v0.44.1 (including some bug fixes) but don't think there have been any breaking changes (or massive new features) so was thinking we should tag and release v0.44.2.
title: Bump v0.44.2
